'''Blue Shuttle''' was a [[Beta-class assault shuttle]] made by [[Telgorn Corporation/Legends|Telgorn Corporation]] and stationed aboard the ''[[Eye of Palpatine]]''. In [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], [[Triv Pothman]] used it to evacuate the inhabitants of the ''Eye''.

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]
